title: Landscape with Trees
summary: Landscape with Trees is a watercolor piece created in 1883 by Vincent van Gogh. It was first shown at an exhibition in 1990 at the Kröller-Müller Museum in Otterlo in the Netherlands.
text: Landscape with Trees is a watercolor piece created in 1883 by Vincent van Gogh. It was first shown at an exhibition in 1990 at the Kröller-Müller Museum in Otterlo in the Netherlands.
